title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BATASAN HILLS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BATASAN HILLS, CITY OF QUEZON, METRO MANILA TO CORAZON C. AQUINO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 1841; 112 OG NO. 4, 361 (January 25, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10716, December 10, 2015 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BATASAN HILLS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BATASAN HILLS, CITY OF QUEZON, METRO MANILA TO CORAZON C. AQUINO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School. â

The name of Batasan Hills National High School in Barangay Batasan Hills, City of Quezon, Metro Manila is hereby changed to Corazon C. Aquino National High School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus. â

The main campus of the Corazon C. Aquino National High School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Batasan Hills, City of Quezon, Metro Manila.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its official publication in the

Official Gazette.

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 24, 2014 and October 5, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: Dec 10 2015

(SGD.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
